source_label: Wikipedia — Surya (/ˈsuːriə/ SOO-ree-ə), the Hindu sun god the project is named after; Wiktionary Sanskrit सूर्य [ˈsuːɾjɐ]
notes: Surya is Datalab's open-source OCR, layout and table-recognition model and Python package (surya-ocr), the engine behind Marker. The README says it is named for the Hindu sun god, Sanskrit/Hindi sources support SOOR-yuh (two syllables, long oo, y-glide), while English Wikipedia gives the anglicized three-syllable SOO-ree-uh; both are attested and no source establishes a winner. The common mistake is reading the first vowel like surrey.
